name: Reflex Plus Cat Food Pouch White Fish Chunks In Gravy 85g
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Chunks in Gravy with White Fish 85g is a complete wet food for adult cats, supporting hydration, digestion, and kidney health with essential vitamins and taurine.
description: Treat your adult cat to a delicious and nutritious meal with Reflex Plus Chunks in Gravy with White Fish Adult Cat Food (85g) . Made with high-quality animal proteins and real white fish, this wet cat food offers excellent digestibility and a balanced mix of vitamins and minerals to support your cat’s overall health. Its rich gravy not only appeals to picky eaters but also contributes to daily hydration, promoting kidney and urinary tract health. The functional nutrients in every pouch help maintain strong muscles, healthy vision, and a robust immune system. Feeding Guidelines: Serve at room temperature for best taste. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water. Gradually introduce diet changes over 5 days. Store unopened in a cool, dry place. Once opened, refrigerate and use within 2 days. Not suitable for human consumption. Key Benefits: Premium Protein: Real white fish for lean muscle and energy. Hydration Support: 83% moisture content supports kidney health. Essential Nutrients: Enriched with taurine, vitamins, and minerals for overall wellness. Digestive Health: Easily digestible for a happy, healthy gut. Convenient Feeding: Single serve 85g pouch keeps food fresh and easy to serve.
